ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the state */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the state in sq km */,
  "total_districts" INTEGER /* Total number of districts in the state */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of urban population in the state */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of rural population in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "unique_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state in that year */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population in the state */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population in the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state per sq km */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unique_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subscription record */,
  "unique_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the population statistics record */,
  "total_subscriptions" REAL /* Total internet subscriptions in the state */,
  "total_broadband_subscriptions" REAL /* Total broadband subscriptions in the state */,
  "total_wireless_subscriptions" REAL /* Total wireless internet subscriptions in the state */,
  "avg_download_speed" REAL /* Average download speed in Mbps */,
  "avg_upload_speed" REAL /* Average upload speed in Mbps */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_subscriptions_unique_code FOREIGN KEY ("unique_code") REFERENCES population_statistics ("unique_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reported_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case record */,
  "unique_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the population statistics record */,
  "cases_reported" INTEGER /* Total cases reported in that year */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate of the reported cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reported_cases_unique_code FOREIGN KEY ("unique_code") REFERENCES population_statistics ("unique_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_usage_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "avg_internet_usage" REAL /* Average internet usage per capita */,
  "avg_time_spent_online" REAL /* Average time spent online per day in hours */,
  "online_activities" TEXT /* Common online activities in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_usage_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health indicator record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the health indicator */,
  "achieved_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the target value achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_documents" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy document */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the policy document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy document */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_documents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, health official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy document accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES policy_documents ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions_by_year" (
  "subscription_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subscription statistics record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_internet_subs" REAL /* Total internet subscriptions in the state */,
  "total_broadband_subs" REAL /* Total broadband subscriptions in the state */,
  "total_wireless_subs" REAL /* Total wireless subscriptions in the state */,
  "subscription_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year growth rate of subscriptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_by_year_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statistics" (
  "case_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case statistics record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported cases */,
  "cases_reported" INTEGER /* Total cases reported in that year */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Case fatality rate of the reported cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_access_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_details" TEXT /* Details of the policy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date of policy implementation */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_access_policies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
